programme.title: Our School's E.T.
programme.desc: Seong Geun menikmati pekerjaannya sebagai guru olahraga, tapi pihak sekolah ingin memecatnya demi memperkerjakan seorang guru bahasa Inggris. Demi bertahan hidup, ia harus mengajar bahasa Inggris yang tak ia kuasai.

programme.title: Marriage Blue
programme.desc: Marriage Blue adalah sebuah film komedi romantis yang menceritakan kemalangan yang dialami empat pasangan kekasih di pekan menjelang hari pernikahan mereka.

programme.title: Ditto
programme.desc: Sebuah suara gema dari masa depan yang terpancar melalui sebuah radio antik menghubungkan dua orang yang hidup dalam periode waktu yang berbeda, dan mengubah hidup Yong selamanya.

programme.title: 1987: When The Day Comes
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1987, seorang aktivis mahasiswa prodemokrasi ditangkap dan disiksa sampai mati oleh polisi. Pihak berwenang mencoba untuk menutupi kasus ini, tetapi banyak orang berjuang untuk mengungkapkan kebenaran.

programme.title: Samjin Company English Class
programme.desc: Pada pertengahan tahun 1990-an di Korea Selatan, tiga pegawai wanita yang mendaftar ke kelas Bahasa Inggris dengan harapan dapat memajukan karier mereka, berjuang untuk mengungkap korupsi di dalam perusahaan mereka.

programme.title: 71: Into The Fire
programme.desc: Tujuh puluh satu tentara pelajar bertempur dalam sebuah peperangan nan sulit melawan pasukan elit Brigade Komando 766 dan mengubah jalan Perang Korea.

programme.title: The King
programme.desc: Tae-soo bercita-cita menjadi seorang jaksa karena percaya bahwa kekuasaan itu penting. Saat ia berhasil mendapatkannya, ia juga melihat kekejaman yang ada di kehidupan orang-orang teratas di Korea pada tahun 1990-an.

programme.title: 4PM
programme.desc: Sepasang suami istri pindah ke sebuah rumah baru di pedesaan untuk menikmati kehidupan yang damai. Namun, kenyataan mengerikan terjadi kala tetangga mereka selalu berkunjung di waktu yang sama setiap hari.

programme.title: Deliver Us From Evil
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pembunuh bayaran menyelidiki sebuah kasus penculikan yang mungkin melibatkan kerabat terdekatnya selagi ia terus dikejar oleh saudara kandung yang menjadi target terakhirnya.

programme.title: Escape From Mogadishu
programme.desc: Anggota kedutaan Korea Utara dan Korea Selatan harus bekerja sama untuk melarikan diri dari Somalia yang dilanda perang.

programme.title: Fabricated City
programme.desc: Ketika seorang pemain game online dijebak atas suatu pembunuhan, seorang peretas mencoba untuk mengungkap kebenaran dan membantu membersihkan namanya.

programme.title: The Negotiation
programme.desc: Seorang pedagang senjata menculik dua warga Korea di Bangkok. Motivasi si penculik pun menjadi lebih jelas saat diketahui bahwa ternyata kedua korban tersebut disandera di sebuah panti asuhan di Korea Selatan.

programme.title: Decibel
programme.desc: Seorang mantan komandan angkatan laut menerima panggilan ancaman yang mengaku akan meledakkan stadion dengan bom. Ia harus berhadapan dengan rahasia yang telah lama ia sembunyikan untuk melacak teroris ini.

programme.title: Love My Scent
programme.desc: Chang-Soo mendapat kemampuan untuk memikat setiap wanita di dunia setelah memakai sebuah parfum yang diterimanya dari seseorang yang tak dikenal. Ara pun mencium aroma Chang-Soo dan jatuh cinta padanya.

programme.title: The Witch: The Other One
programme.desc: Seorang gadis misterius yang selamat dari serangan brutal di sebuah laboratorium rahasia mendapati dirinya dilacak oleh sekelompok pembunuh.

programme.title: Herb
programme.desc: Seorang wanita berusia 20 tahun dengan gangguan mental ringan jatuh cinta pada seorang polisi, tapi ia harus patah hati saat dipaksa untuk menghadapi kenyataan tentang dirinya sendiri dan orang-orang di sekitarnya.

programme.title: Oh! My Gran
programme.desc: Saat putrinya koma setelah mengalami tabrak lari, sang ayah mencoba melacak si pengemudi dengan bantuan ibunya yang menderita penyakit Alzheimer dan satu-satunya saksi mata dalam kecelakaan tersebut.

programme.title: The Point Men
programme.desc: Seorang diplomat dan seorang agen Badan Intelijen Nasional ditugaskan ke Afghanistan demi menyelamatkan para misionaris Korea Selatan yang ditangkap oleh kelompok Taliban dalam waktu 24 jam.

programme.title: Fabricated City
programme.desc: Ketika seorang pemain game online dijebak atas suatu pembunuhan, seorang peretas mencoba untuk mengungkap kebenaran dan membantu membersihkan namanya.

programme.title: Waiting For Rain
programme.desc: Seorang siswa mendapatkan kembali semangat hidupnya setelah bertukar surat dengan teman masa kecilnya dan berjanji untuk bertemu jika hujan turun pada tanggal 31 Desember setiap tahun.

programme.title: The Negotiation
programme.desc: Seorang pedagang senjata menculik dua warga Korea di Bangkok. Motivasi si penculik pun menjadi lebih jelas saat diketahui bahwa ternyata kedua korban tersebut disandera di sebuah panti asuhan di Korea Selatan.

programme.title: Confession
programme.desc: Seorang pria yang menjadi tersangka kasus pembunuhan mencari bantuan dari seorang pengacara untuk membuktikan bahwa ia tidak bersalah. Saat mereka mulai mengumpulkan bukti-bukti, kebenaran pun perlahan terkuak.

programme.title: Confidential Assignment 2
programme.desc: Detektif Korea Utara kembali untuk misi rahasia lainnya. Meski memiliki alasan yang berbeda, tiga negara bergabung untuk menjatuhkan sebuah organisasi kejahatan internasional.

programme.title: 4PM
programme.desc: Sepasang suami istri pindah ke sebuah rumah baru di pedesaan untuk menikmati kehidupan yang damai. Namun, kenyataan mengerikan terjadi kala tetangga mereka selalu berkunjung di waktu yang sama setiap hari.

programme.title: Just Wanna Say I Love U
The Carbonaro Effect S4
programme.desc: While remodeling a home, Michael uncovers an explosive way to paint and silences a co-worker with a traveling squeak. Later, Michael takes scrapbooking to blinding speed, and a hospital becomes the scene of a mind-bending game of cops and robbers!

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2
programme.desc: Security cameras in front yards, backyards and street corners capture crimes, mishaps and earth-shattering moments like break-ins and hit-and-runs. It's up to local law enforcement to save the day.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2
programme.desc: Whether a crook on trial takes flight or an inmate gets cozy with a corrections officer, handcuffs and prison walls are no match for rebellious convicts who make last-ditch efforts to break free.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2
programme.desc: Most of the world is uncharted wilderness & untamed backcountry full of rugged terrain & wild inhabitants. It takes a special kind of police officer to survive and thrive as they take down criminals.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2
programme.desc: Crooks will utilize every tool at their disposal to make an escape -- and officers must do the same in a dangerous battle of wits, speed and weaponry.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2
programme.desc: In the world of air travel, crime and misconduct are skyrocketing. Unruly travelers are denied boarding, and mechanical issues lead to chaos

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2
programme.desc: Officers in high-velocity situations need to make life-or-death decisions and put their lives in danger to protect and serve every day.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5
programme.desc: Michael breezes into the Windy City to shock and amaze the Chicago locals. In a health store, he sells a supplement that proves you are what you drink, and at a Metro station, he utterly derails a commuter's sense of reality.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5
programme.desc: In a local Chicago diner, Michael brings new meaning to the term "hold the pickles." Plus, he discovers an aggressive new breed of fungus at a park, and later, he helps a coworker disappear from work early in a hospital warehouse.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5
programme.desc: At a market, Michael reveals an amazing credit card hack, and at a science shop, he demonstrates how far stem cell research has come. Later, Michael spooks a gardener who's certain that angry gnomes are hunting him down!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5
programme.desc: Michael discovers a ferocious new breed of animal at a park, customers are steeped in confusion when Michael invades a local tea shop, and a woman gets her feathers ruffled when she realizes she's a witness to a transformation.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5
programme.desc: Michael reveals the transformative properties of fruits and vegetables, and shows a caterer the true power of dairy products. Plus, an antique store customer is stunned when a species of termite literally chews through the scenery!

programme.title: The Flash S9
programme.desc: A new big bad is introduced to Team Flash and friends and foes, old and new, begin to descend upon Central City in the season premiere.

programme.title: The Flash S9
programme.desc: Barry feels guilty for what happened to Caitlin. Mark hatches a plan which makes everyone skeptical. Red Death looms in Central City and commands that failure is not an option.

programme.title: The Flash S9
programme.desc: Barry and Iris believe they know what the Rogues are after. Team Flash recruits unlikely allies to help. Allegra does her best to avoid having a conversation with Chester.

programme.title: The Flash S9
programme.desc: With the power out in the city, Team Flash calls upon the Rogue Squad to help as Iris is visited by an old friend. Joe and Cecile work on finding a balance.

programme.title: The Flash S9
programme.desc: As the Red Death wreaks havoc on Central City, Barry and Iris come up with a plan and turn to Cecile for help. Barry is faced with his greatest mistake.

programme.title: Wahl Street S2
programme.desc: After surprising everyone with news of his family’s impending move to Vegas, Mark attempts to square away each of his businesses as he heads to London to film his next movie.

programme.title: Miracle Workers S3
programme.desc: Small-town reverend Ezekiel Brown enlists outlaw Benny the Teen to lead his people west along the Oregon Trail.

programme.title: Miracle Workers S3
programme.desc: The wagon train must ford a dangerous river, leading to a moral struggle between Ezekiel and Benny over the soul of the group. Meanwhile, Prudence and Todd meet hipster pioneers living wagonlife.

programme.title: Miracle Workers S3
programme.desc: Ezekiel signs up for a buffalo hunting expedition to prove his manhood. Meanwhile, Benny teaches Prudence how to be a bandit.

programme.title: Miracle Workers S3
programme.desc: The wagon train stops in the sinful town of Branchwater, luring Ezekiel into a night of debauchery and temptation.

programme.title: Geostorm
programme.desc: What if, in the wake of more than a decade of devastating weather events, we finally found a way to control Mother Nature and the destruction her tirades entail? When catastrophic climate change endangers Earth’s very survival, world governments unite and create Project Dutch Boy: a global net of satellites surrounding the planet that are armed with geo-engineering technologies designed to stave off the natural disasters. After successfully protecting the planet for two years, something is starting to go wrong. Two estranged brothers (Gerard Butler, Jim Sturgess) are tasked with solving the program’s malfunction before a worldwide geostorm can engulf the planet.

programme.title: Hack My Life Inside Hacks S1
programme.desc: We're back with behind-the-scenes intel from your favorite hacks! What's the best way to get likes on a popular dating app? And how much fun did Brooke and Kevin really have while using duct tape to wax? Find out on Inside Hacks.

programme.title: Friends S5
programme.desc: Chandler's behavior toward his boss annoys Monica. Ross' latest romance astounds everyone.

programme.title: Friends S5
programme.desc: Phoebe meets her father at her grandmother's funeral. Chandler discovers that Monica gives bad massages. Rachel dresses Joey for an audition. complete with a man's shoulder bag.

programme.title: Friends S5
programme.desc: Chandler and Monica's relationship becomes less of a secret. Ross must prove to his boss that he's sane in order to return to work.

programme.title: Friends S5
programme.desc: Chandler thinks Monica wants more from their relationship. Ross fails to impress his new neighbors.

programme.title: Friends S5
programme.desc: After Phoebe finds a police badge, she uses it to do good deeds. Joey worries that he is in love with Monica.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S4
programme.desc: Sean holds a one of a kind auction in Malibu, at the Rolls Royce of storage facilities. T Money needs a robot -- but does that mean he'll get it? Jesse draws on his pinball skills to outwit his competitors, while Brandon and Lori take one of the biggest gambles of their career. Will it pay off with an unbelievable score, or will they be crying all the way to the bank?

programme.title: Storage Hunters S5
programme.desc: Lori knows from her research that two of these bins previously belonged to the same owner. She and Brandon win one of them, an aviation bin; now they have to find the other one. But things don't go the way they want when Dan, the Biker Dude, ends upwith the matching bin; now they either have to make a deal, or get stuck with half a plane.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S5
programme.desc: Jesse finds a bin that is out of this world, while Team Brandori gambles on some dangerous games. New player Mone proves she's not here to play games - she is the game baby! And she's not afraid to find out what's inside the creepiest box yet!

programme.title: Storage Hunters S5
programme.desc: The big tension of the day is between T Money and Brandon. T goes for the mystery bins -- the box and the barrels. The antique gun he finds has been altered, so he needs to find out if it's worth anything.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S5
programme.desc: Papa Bear is back, and he's bigger than ever. He goes for a pair of mysterious blue shipping cases. Brandon and Lori find a 3 D printer, but have no idea what it does or how much it's worth until they take it to get appraised. What they find out amazes them.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S11
programme.desc: While Penny helps Sheldon figure out his next move in science, Bert, the geologist, replaces Howard in his band, "Footprints on the Moon."

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S11
programme.desc: Raj is caught between a rock and a hard place when he discovers he's dating a married woman (BETH BEHRS). Sheldon rents his old room back for a place to work.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S11
programme.desc: While Sheldon petitions Wil Wheaton to appear on the new Professor Proton show, Leonard finds himself in an awkward spot after he asks his friends for feedback on his novel.

programme.title: Dirty Money S1
programme.desc: The Direstas meet a shrewd businessman who owns an aeronautic graveyard. Has John met his haggling equal? Can Jimmy create some unique aviation art?

programme.title: Live By Night
programme.desc: Oscar® winner Ben Affleck directs, writes and stars in this dramatic crime thriller set in the Roaring '20s, when Prohibition hadn't stopped the illegal flow of alcohol, leaving an opportunity for any man to gain power and money.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S11
programme.desc: When Bernadette won't go into labor, all her friends try to help out; and Howard learns that Bernadette has already chosen their son's name.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S11
programme.desc: While Leonard struggles to secure the perfect wedding venue for Sheldon and Amy, Howard and Bernadette struggle with who should work and who should stay with the kids.

programme.title: Sucker Punch
programme.desc: Close your eyes. Open your mind. You will be unprepared. From the Spartan slaughter of 300 to the visionary world of Watchmen, writer/director/producer Zack Snyder has transported audiences into visual dreamscapes of his creation. His latest cinematic mind trip takes us into the vivid imagination of a young girl (The Uninvited's Emily Browning) whose dream world provides the ultimate escape from her darker institutionalized reality. Unrestrained by the boundaries of time and place, she is free to go where her mind takes her, but her incredible adventures blur the lines between what's real and what is imaginary. Locked away against her will, but determined to fight for her freedom, she and four other girls battle everything from serpents tosamurais on an unbelievable journey to set themselves free. Like "Alice in Wonderland with machine guns," Snyder's epic action fantasy is filmed in such a way that the action sequences aren't limited by physical real...
